content_en:
The above-fabricated khabar is promoting Catholicism in Islam, because in the Catholic faith divorce is extremely difficult or totally forbidden.

This hadith even though it is widespread is classified weak by the scholars of Hadith. Even though divorce is allowed in Islam it becomes Haraam when there is no need for it ie. in the case where both husband and wife are compatible and are living happily together in love and harmony.

There are two types of divorce, Sunnee i.e. in accordance with the Sunnah of the Holy Prophet 2 and Bid’ee ie. a divorce conducted against the Sunnah of the Prophet 2%. Divorce Bid’ ee is to divorce a woman while she is menstruating or to say to a woman I divorce you, I divorce you, I divorce you three times in one go in the same sitting. If a man divorces his wife while she is menstruating he has to take her back and wait for her to finish her menstruation and after she takes a bath and becomes clean he is now allowed to divorce her without cohabiting with her. If he cohabits with her, then divorces her he is being sinful.

Whenever a man divorces his wife while she is menstruating even though he is obliged to take her back it is still counted as one divorce. So he has two chances left to divorce his

As for the man who divorces his wife three times in one sitting by saying I divorce you three times, there is big confusion and dispute among the scholars as to whether or not it should be counted as one or three divorces. Those who hold the opinion that it should be counted as three divorces also hold the opinion that the wife becomes haraam for her husband until she marries another man who will cohabit with her, and if she gets a divorce from the second husband, only then can the first husband remarry her with a new dowry and two witnesses. This is the opinion of the four great Imams, some Sahaabahs and scholars like Umar (ra) and Aisha (ra).

The other opinion states that if a man should pronounce three divorces on his wife in the same sitting; it is counted as one only. This is the opinion of Ibn Abbaas (ra), Ali (ra) as well as Ibn Taymiyya Jafar As-Saadiq, Muhammad al-Baaqir and the pupil of Ibn Taymiyya Ibn ul-Qayyim.

There is no doubt that the most accurate opinion on this matter is that of Ali (ra) and his cousin Ibn Abaas (ra). This is so because their evidence is stronger than those who hold the opposite view. Among their evidence is the hadith found in Muslim where Abu al-Sahba (ra) said to the Prophet’s Bae cousin Ibn Abbaas (ra): “Do you know that three divorces were treated as one during the lifetime of Allah's Apostle 3% and during the caliphate of Abu Bakr and during three years of the caliphate of Umar? Ibn Abbaas said yes. 797

Since the Holy Prophet 2 used to count three divorces in one sitting as one divorce, we should do the same today because Allah 3% said:

“And whatsoever the Messenger gives you take it and whatsoever he forbids you abstain from it.”*

To impose on the Muslims the opinion that three divorces in one sitting is irrevocable is unwise. And such people are seeking to advance the argument that they know the Deen more than Allah’s Messenger 23 It is for this reason Ibn Abbaas (ra) and Ali (ra) championed the opinion that it’s counted as only one divorce. Also we are living in the last days where people are lacking in imaan; consequently they have very little control over their tongue. So if we should go by the first view that three divorces in one sitting is counted as three instead of one, this will lead to the disintegration of the Muslim family structure.

The divorced woman has to wait three menstruations before she can remarry. If she is pregnant then her Iddah (waiting period) is until she delivers. If her husband divorces her before cohabiting with her then she has no Iddah. If she divorces her husband with Khula i.e. by returning the dowry her Iddah is one menstruation. Her Khula has to be performed by an Imam or a scholar. The Iddah of a widow is four months and ten days.

If a man should say to his wife I divorce you jokingly it

is still counted as one divorce. Thus divorce is a grave matter, which we are not allowed to play with. Hence the Holy Prophet 25 said: “Three things should always be taken serious whether they are said in earnest or jest, the wedlock, the divorce and the emancipation. ”*?

As I have mentioned previously it is not right for two Muslims to divorce from each other if there is love and compatibility in the marriage. In regards to this the Holy Prophet 225 has said: “If any woman asks her husband for a divorce without some strong reason, the fragrance of Paradise will be JSorbidden for her.”

The same ruling goes for the husband who divorces his wife without a valid reason. A woman divorcing her husband for a valid reason includes:

1. She is divorcing him because she was forced by her parents to marry him even though she expressed that she has no feelings for him.

2. She is divorcing him because he beats her harshly continuously.

3. He is lazy and refuses to provide.

4. She is divorcing him because he is evil in character e.g. he smokes, drinks, gambles, watches porn material, commits adultery, takes drugs, abandons his salah etc.

The Holy Prophet 32 never used to visit a sick person until after three days.

Related by Ibn Asaakir 16/226 and classified fabricated by Ibn

Beware of zina (unlawful sexual intercourse) for verily it results in six evil consequences, three of which occur on earth while the others occur in the hereafter. As for those that occur on earth they are:

1. It takes away radiance from your face.

2. It breeds poverty.

3. It causes your sustenance to decrease.

And as for those that will occur in the hereafter they are:

1. It brings down the wrath of the Lord.

2. It makes one’s reckoning become difficult.

3. It causes one to abide in the heli-fire forever.

Related by Abu Na’eem and classified fabricated by Ibn Jawzee.

The message of this hadith is accurate except for one fault; the sentence that states that zina causes someone to be in the hell-fire forever. This is the aqeedah of the Khawaarij. There is no Sahaabah or classical scholar past or present that holds the view that fornication or adultery causes a person to be in the hell-fire forever.

In regards to this Allah 3% said:

“Verily Allah doesn’t forgive the crime of worshipping false deities but He forgives anything other than that to whom He pleases."

Hence the person who commits zina is still a Muslim. He becomes a Kafir only if he claims that zina is halaal. Since he is still a Muslim he cannot be in the hell-fire forever because the Holy Prophet 25 said: “He who has the smallest particle of Zman in his heart will be taken out of the hell-fire.’"”

According to the aqeedah of Ahlus Sunnah Wal Jamaa’ah we do not pronounce a Muslim Kafir for his sin unless he pronounces his sin lawful. However, there are certain crimes that are so grave; the moment the person commits one of these crimes he or she becomes a Kafir, even if they didn’t intend to become a Kafir.

For example, to work magic, to sleep with one’s father’s wife, to insult Allah 3%, His Messenger 2 or the Holy Qur’an (in earnest or jest), or to replace the Shariah with manmade laws. In regards to the Shariah Allah 3% said:

js eSiias dhs abty zi, K 5504423

“Those who do not govern by what Allah revealed verily they are Kafirs.”!”

There are some Muslims today who claim that this verse means disbeliever of a lesser degree, thus the person who dismantles the Shariah is not really a disbeliever because to dismantle the Shariah is a minor issue, a minor kufr. We refute them by saying a person is either a Muslim or a disbeliever, hence there is no such thing as a disbeliever of a lesser degree. This is bid’ah in regards to aqeedah, the worst form of bid’ah. If to dismantle the Shariah was minor kuff, as they would like all Muslims to believe, why did Allah 3% find it necessary to turn the Jews into apes and swine when they tampered with their Shariah in regards to the Sabbath. The Shari’ah of Muhammad 28 is more valuable than the Shari’ah of Musa **<#!\so to dismantle it is major kufr (disbelief) that makes someone become a kafir. The people who are promoting the aqeedah that to dismantle the Shari’ah is kufr doona kuff i.e. minor kufr they themselves have become Kafirs for saying this. Are they trying to insinuate that Allah 3% is an oppressor and Allah 3% was overreacting when he turned the Jews into apes and swine for tampering with the Sabbath.

The reason why I said earlier that most of the message in this fabricated hadith is true is because Ibn ul-Qayyim has made mention of these evil consequences of sins in his book Al Jawaab Al-Kaafee page 98-101.

We can see for ourselves that in any society in which zina becomes widespread there are always a lot of street children living in poverty without parents e.g. South America, Africa, North America, Far East Asia etc.

Additionally Allah 3% said about the fornicator:

If the fornicator makes taubah he will be forgiven but if he makes it halaal and refuses to make taubah; he will abide in Hell forever.
content_id:
Khabar palsu di atas mempromosikan Katolisisme dalam Islam, karena dalam iman Katolik perceraian sangat sulit atau sama sekali terlarang.

Hadis ini meskipun tersebar luas diklasifikasikan lemah oleh para ulama hadis. Meskipun perceraian diperbolehkan dalam Islam, perceraian menjadi haram ketika tidak ada keperluannya — yaitu dalam kasus di mana suami dan istri cocok satu sama lain dan hidup bersama dengan penuh kasih dan keharmonisan.

Ada dua jenis perceraian: Sunni, yakni sesuai dengan sunnah Nabi ﷺ; dan Bid'i, yakni perceraian yang dilakukan bertentangan dengan sunnah Nabi ﷺ. Talak Bid'i adalah menceraikan wanita saat ia sedang haid atau mengucapkan kepada wanita "Aku ceraikan kamu, aku ceraikan kamu, aku ceraikan kamu" tiga kali sekaligus dalam satu dudukan. Jika seorang suami menceraikan istrinya saat ia sedang haid, ia harus merujuknya kembali dan menunggu istrinya selesai haid, lalu setelah mandi dan suci ia baru boleh menceraikannya tanpa berhubungan badan. Jika ia berhubungan badan dengannya, kemudian menceraikannya, maka ia berdosa.

Apabila seorang suami menceraikan istrinya saat haid, meskipun ia wajib merujuknya kembali, itu tetap dihitung sebagai satu talak. Jadi masih tersisa dua kesempatan talak lagi.

Adapun seorang suami yang menceraikan istrinya tiga kali sekaligus dalam satu dudukan dengan mengucapkan "Aku ceraikan kamu tiga kali," terdapat perdebatan dan perselisihan besar di antara para ulama tentang apakah itu dihitung sebagai satu atau tiga talak.

Menikahlah dan jangan bercerai karena sesungguhnya talak itu mengguncang Arasy Allah ﷻ.

Hadis ini diklasifikasikan lemah. Meskipun perceraian diperbolehkan, Nabi ﷺ menyebutnya sebagai hal yang halal namun paling dibenci oleh Allah ﷻ. Oleh karena itu sangat dianjurkan untuk menghindari perceraian kecuali jika benar-benar diperlukan.

Barangsiapa memiliki anak laki-laki dan menamainya Ahmad karena mengambil berkah, maka ia dan anaknya akan berada di surga.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Bakir dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ibnu Jawzi.

Hadis palsu ini mempromosikan irja' (liberalisme) dan memberikan harapan palsu kepada kaum Muslimin bahwa mungkin masuk surga tanpa mengamalkan Islam. Agar seorang Muslim masuk surga, ia harus memenuhi tujuh syarat syahadat.

Barangsiapa memiliki tiga anak laki-laki dan tidak menamakan satu pun dari mereka Muhammad, maka ia sungguh adalah orang yang bodoh.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ath-Thabarani dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Adz-Dzahabi.

Barangsiapa membangun rumah lebih besar dari yang diperlukan, ia akan dipaksa untuk menanggungnya di bahunya pada Hari Kiamat.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ibnu Bakir dan diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ibnu Jawzi.

Mencintai tanah airmu adalah bagian dari iman.

Diklasifikasikan sebagai palsu oleh Ash-Shaghani.

Khabar palsu ini mempromosikan nasionalisme. Saat ini nasionalisme adalah kanker dalam tubuh umat yang menghambat pertumbuhan spiritual dan ekonomi umat. Khabar palsu ini menyebabkan kaum Muslimin menyebut diri mereka sebagai Muslim Inggris, Muslim Pakistan, Muslim India, dan sebagainya. Sedangkan Allah ﷻ berfirman: "Sesungguhnya orang-orang mukmin itu bersaudara."

Sedikit amal yang disertai ilmu lebih baik daripada banyak amal yang disertai kebodohan.

Khabar ini bukan hadis Nabi ﷺ melainkan ucapan para ulama. Kandungannya benar dan memiliki dasar dalam Islam, namun tidak boleh dikutip sebagai hadis Nabi ﷺ.

Waspadailah dunia karena ia adalah ibu segala fitnah.

Tidak memiliki isnad yang sahih. Namun peringatannya tentang bahaya ketamakan dunia memiliki dasar yang kuat dalam banyak hadis sahih Nabi ﷺ tentang zuhud dan peringatan terhadap cinta dunia berlebihan.

Barangsiapa berhaji ke Ka'bah di Mekah dan tidak mengunjungi kuburku, ia telah berlaku kasar kepadaku.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ad-Daruquthni dan dinilai dha'if (lemah) oleh para ulama hadis. Mengunjungi Madinah dan masjid Nabi ﷺ memang sangat dianjurkan, namun bukan sebagai bagian dari ritual haji. Berkunjung ke makam Nabi ﷺ dibolehkan dengan niat mengunjungi masjid Nabi ﷺ yang mulia, bukan untuk beribadah di kuburan.

Barangsiapa berhaji lalu mengunjungi kuburku setelah kematianku, seolah-olah ia mengunjungiku semasa hidupku.

Diriwayatkan oleh Ad-Daruquthni dengan sanad yang lemah. Kunjungan ke Madinah adalah sunnah yang dianjurkan berdasarkan hadis-hadis sahih tentang keutamaan Masjid Nabawi. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Salat di masjidku ini lebih utama seribu kali lipat daripada salat di masjid lainnya kecuali Masjidil Haram."
content_ar:
من الظواهر الخطيرة في تاريخ الأحاديث الموضوعة أن بعضها كان يستهدف إدخال قيم وأحكام غريبة عن الإسلام تحت غطاء النسبة إلى النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم. ومن أبرز الأمثلة على ذلك ما يتعلق بأحكام الطلاق.

الطلاق في الإسلام: حكم وضوابط

أباح الإسلام الطلاق وجعله ملاذاً أخيراً حين تستحيل الحياة الزوجية، لكنه أحاطه بسياج من الضوابط والشروط التي تحفظ حقوق الطرفين. والأصل في الطلاق أنه مكروه إذا لم تكن ثمة حاجة داعية إليه، لما فيه من تفريق بين الزوجين وآثار سلبية على الأسرة والأبناء. قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم في الحديث الصحيح: "أبغض الحلال إلى الله الطلاق"، رواه أبو داود وابن ماجه.

الحديث الموضوع في شأن الطلاق

روّج بعض الوضّاعين أحاديث تُحرّم الطلاق تحريماً مطلقاً أو تُغلّظ فيه تغليظاً مبالغاً فيه، على نحو يُشبه ما تعتقده الكنيسة الكاثوليكية من تحريم الطلاق البتّة. وهذا النوع من الأحاديث المصنوعة يستهدف إدخال فكر ديني أجنبي في الإسلام، مما يجعل نقده والتنبيه عليه فريضة شرعية. فالإسلام لا يُحرّم الطلاق بل يُنظّمه، والفرق بين التنظيم والتحريم فرق جوهري.

متى يكون الطلاق حراماً

وإن كان الطلاق مباحاً في أصله فإنه يكون حراماً في حالات محددة، منها:

  • الطلاق في الحيض أو النفاس، لأن فيه إضراراً بالمرأة وإطالة لعدّتها.
  • الطلاق الثلاث بلفظ واحد عند جمهور العلماء، إذ يُفضي إلى حرمان الزوجين من فرصة الرجعة.
  • الطلاق بنية الإضرار بالزوجة دون مسوّغ شرعي.

الطلاق في المذاهب الفقهية

تناولت المذاهب الفقهية الأربعة مسائل الطلاق بتفصيل واسع، وأجمعت على أنه حلال مع الكراهة في غير موضع الحاجة. ومن أبرز ما تناوله الفقهاء:

  • أنواع الطلاق: طلاق السنة وطلاق البدعة.
  • الطلاق الرجعي والبائن وما يترتب على كل منهما.
  • آداب الطلاق وما يجب مراعاته من حقوق الزوجة والأبناء.
  • الخلع وفسخ النكاح وما تلجأ إليه المرأة إذا أرادت الفراق.

خطر الأحاديث المروّجة لتحريم الطلاق

إن ترويج أحاديث موضوعة تُحرّم الطلاق أو تُشدّد فيه زيادة عما شرعه الله لا يضر الدين وحسب، بل يضر المجتمع أيضاً، إذ يُفضي إلى:

  • إبقاء أسر في حالة تعاسة وشقاق دائمين.
  • ظلم المرأة بحبسها في زواج لا يقوم على المودة والرحمة.
  • صرف الناس عن الحلول الشرعية المشروعة إلى مخارج غير مشروعة.

والواجب على المسلم أن يرجع في مسائل الطلاق إلى الفقه الإسلامي المعتمد وأن لا يُعوّل على ما شاع من أحاديث لم تثبت نسبتها إلى النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم.
